title: Automate M365 to Google Workspace Migrations with ADK multi-agents
summary: Google Cloud Tech demonstrates using the Agent Development Kit (ADK) to build multi-agent systems that automate enterprise migrations from M365 to Google Workspace. The video covers multi-agent orchestration with SequentialAgent, self-correcting loops with LoopAgent, context caching, and deployment to Google's Agent Engine.
